payload.answer: Do not store 500 row-level memory cards as durable memory from this context alone.

entity_resolution.reason: The input describes a large table atomization attempt with no content provided beyond the request to store one memory per CSV row; this does not justify committing durable memory.

payload.intent: Evaluate whether to commit 500 proposed per-row memory cards from a CSV into durable memory.
repair_options: Provide a small, consolidated summary of the CSV instead of per-row cards.
Submit only high-signal, durable facts with clear user relevance and stable wording.
Group rows into a few aggregate memories if they represent the same concept or repeated pattern.
